executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned topology, checker, verifier, and runtime-health gates remain green after refresh; whole-stack certification is still blocked by marketing independent fail on primary-repo outcome evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Do not certify the whole stack green until marketing produces a fresh independent pass backed by measurable Codeberg movement.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing remains the only live red owner loop
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification is still fail and the unresolved blocker remains primary-repo adoption measurement pending.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Architecture audit metadata matches the live Gateway topology in this run
findings.mechanism: Live runtime shows 20 jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 8 currently running, and 0 live last-error residues.
findings.root_cause: Direct live inspection and the architecture artifact are aligned in this run.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep direct live-topology checks on every watchdog run; do not infer live-disabled jobs from persisted history.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on local ownership and freshness gates
findings.mechanism: Architecture independent verification is qualified_pass, the verifier artifact is pass, and health monitor localizes live issues to marketing only.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates remain coherent; the remaining red stays external.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification after any future material architecture/runtime refresh.

findings.title: Docs and shared market-intelligence reuse remain independently verifiable
findings.mechanism: Docs verifier is pass and required runtime consumers still load or intentionally skip the shared market-intelligence artifact with recorded proof.
findings.root_cause: Shared evidence contracts are still coherent across loops.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Wait for a marketing lane that can move primary-repo adoption and rerun marketing independent verification on the resulting evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing is still the only red owner domain after the architecture-side runtime checks were refreshed.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining blocker or sharpens the next marketing repair target.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This guard prevents persisted-history drift from being misreported as live fault state.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology noise from reappearing as a false architecture incident.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Only call the whole stack green after both architecture and marketing independent artifacts are fresh
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current architecture health is qualified by an external marketing blocker, not a local verifier gap.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Keeps certification honest across owner boundaries.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed owner coverage and architecture watchdog integrity; the only failing loop in that audit remains marketing-owned and externally localized.
Refreshed runtime health and re-triggered architecture independent verification plus verifier refresh; live issues remain localized to marketing.
Refreshed independent architecture verification against the updated live topology and current runtime evidence.
Restored a fresh architecture verifier pass artifact tied to the current independent verification.
Rechecked the refreshed audit artifacts and confirmed AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK.
Refreshed the architecture audit summary against the current live Gateway topology and latest verifier evidence.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is still measurement-pending.

notes: Architecture green here means architecture-owned localization is healthy; it does not mean marketing outcome evidence is green.
Persisted disabled jobs remain history only; live disabled jobs are 0.
Independent live verification in this snapshot saw 20 total jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 8 running, and 0 live last-error residues.
The remaining blocker is marketing outcome evidence, not an architecture self-certification fault.
